title: supplier_price_trend.py output
description: Requires --supplier (always). --component is optional and, unlike every other --supplier-scoped script in this skill, does not just narrow scope when given — it switches the facet dimension. When --component is omitted: by_component is populated (one key per component_category the supplier has orders in, across the whole dataset) and by_criticality is absent. When --component is given: by_criticality is populated instead (one key per component_criticality tier within that component) and by_component is absent. Exactly one of by_component/by_criticality is present per run, never both, never neither.

component.description: null when facet dimension is component_category (by_component populated); a string when facet dimension is component_criticality (by_criticality populated).

criticality.description: Always null — criticality is a breakdown dimension here, never a filter.

by_component.description: Present only when --component was omitted. Keys are component_category values dynamic to the dataset.

by_criticality.description: Present only when --component was given. Keys are component_criticality values dynamic to the dataset, scoped to that one component.
